creator: zahatski@gmail.com
text:
Hi !

Yes, this port  can not  use multiple make jobs (parallelization).
Is there a possibility to disable parallel making?

From http://tb.p6m7g8.net//errors/9-CURRENT-amd64/parrot-2.0.0.log :
--Begin Environment---
...
FORCE_MAKE_JOBS=yes
...

At the end of log:

Perldoc is required, but not detected.
gmake: *** No rule to make target `runtime/parrot/library/nqp-rx.pbc',
needed by `installable_parrot-nqp'.  Stop.
gmake: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
You have chosen to use multiple make jobs (parallelization) for all ports.
This port was not tested for this setting.  Please remove FORCE_MAKE_JOBS and
retry the build before reporting the failure to the maintainer.
*** Error code 1
